name: stale-teammate-watcher
description: Detects teammate inactivity > 3 min during active Rune workflows and emits a STATE_CHANGE line. Complements detect-stale-lead.sh Stop hook (which backs off when this monitor is active).

name: echo-search-eager-reindex
description: Watches tmp/.rune-signals/.echo-dirty and triggers echo index rebuild eagerly, so the first subsequent echo_search does not pay the rebuild cost.
